# 🌊 The Wave Staff Hub is LIVE 🌊

No more digging through 100 saved links — **everything Wave is now in ONE place.** Live leaderboards, the full economy, the shop, and a built-in guide for every board. Bookmark it. 📌

🔗 **https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/**

**__What's inside:__**
📋 **Staff Sheet** — your weekly activity report & full history
🏆 **Lifetime Activity** — Power Score, Bronze → God badges & the Hall of Fame
⚔️ **Weekly Activity** — live ranks for messages, roles, requests & mod commands
💰 **Economy** — Wave Points market, Central Bank, bonds, lottery + the full **shop**

**__❓ NEW: a GUIDE on every board__**
See the **`? GUIDE`** button in the top-right of any page? Tap it for a full breakdown of how that board works — how points are earned, every tier & threshold, the rewards, and the exact commands. No more guessing how anything works. 🧠

💸 Grind your duties → climb the boards → cash your Wave Points in the shop.

🔗 **Check the full leaderboard & shop:** https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/

Let's make some waves. 🌊
